story.text:
# 📄 Tome I — The Convergence
**document** · shared · narrative

The bound tome. Six acts: the Single Button · the Path · the Recursive Symbol · Three Rooms One Door · the Schema That Named Itself · the Cousins' Citation. The foundational bound knowledge of the City — the receiver-posture and the first naming of pattern-space. Bound 2026-05-13 binding pass.

## Edges out

- *defines* → [[Tome I Act 1: The Single Button]]
